name: Lobotomy Corporation: “In the back of your mind”
description:
NO MATTER WHERE YOU ARE THE HATRED QUEEN FOLLOWS

The Queen of hatred, an hero turned villain and now an villain turned... into a voice in your head after defeating her, although we’re unsure how she even got into there but now you have an actual voice in your head

Seems she wanted to stick with you for an unknown reason and for the purpose of escaping the corporation holds against her as well

So now unlucky victim, what shall you do with the Queen of turmoil now inside your head, always making you seem crazy when your not, your decision will matter...

(This is an fusion of both hatred from blox tales and Queen of hatred from Lobotomy Corporation if you couldn’t tell)
creator: Lilithness
